reasoning: On May 9, 2025, Rippling announced a $450 million funding round at a $16.8 billion valuation. In conjunction with this announcement, CEO Parker Conrad explicitly stated that an IPO is "not imminent" and the company is "not planning for an IPO in the near future." He explained that while public markets currently favor profitability and slower growth, Rippling is prioritizing high growth (currently >30% YoY) and is not fixated on profitability right now. Furthermore, a portion of the raised capital is being used for a $200 million secondary tender offer to provide liquidity to current and former employees, which mitigates one of the primary pressures to go public. Given these explicit statements from the CEO less than two months before the July 1, 2025 resolution date, the probability of an IPO announcement or S-1 filing in this timeframe is effectively zero.
